title: Searching for Skylab
original_title: Searching for Skylab, America's Forgotten Triumph
overview: The first American space station Skylab is found in pieces scattered in Western Australia. Putting these pieces back together and re-tracing the Skylab program back to its very conception reveals the cornerstone of human space exploration.

trailers.title: Film on 1st US Space Station casts new light on scientific discoveries

trailer_groups.title: Film on 1st US Space Station casts new light on scientific discoveries

en.title: Film on 1st US Space Station casts new light on scientific discoveries
